ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region or country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region or country */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Region code (e.g., ISO 3166-1 alpha-3) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the language */,
  "language_family" TEXT /* Language family (e.g., Indo-European, Sino-Tibetan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "publication_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "publication_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the publication type (e.g., print, digital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "project_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  "program_area" TEXT /* Program area (e.g., health, migration, development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "subtopic" TEXT /* Subtopic (e.g., a more specific area within the topic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_topics" (
  "doc_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document-topic mapping */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "relevance_score" INTEGER /* Relevance score of the topic to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_authors" (
  "doc_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document-author mapping */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., comment, question, correction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes or updates in the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shared_workspaces" (
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace */,
  "workspace_name" TEXT /* Name of the workspace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workspace */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the workspace */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the workspace was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_workspaces_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspace_members" (
  "workspace_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace member */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workspace */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the workspace (e.g., admin, contributor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_members_workspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("workspace_id") REFERENCES shared_workspaces ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspace_documents" (
  "workspace_document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace document */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workspace */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_documents_workspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("workspace_id") REFERENCES shared_workspaces ("workspace_id")
)
